compiled_state.title: Update project docs to reflect cross-epic interaction scan
compiled_state.author: Claude
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update existing documentation to reflect the new cross-epic interaction scan capability and its configuration.
**Why**: Ensures future agents and practitioners have accurate awareness of the new scan mechanism, its configuration keys, and the new agent in the routing table.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md Named-agent dispatch table (add interaction classifier entry), CLAUDE.md Architecture section (cross-epic scan description), CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles key), design-notes.md if applicable
- OUT: Creating new documentation files

## Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Named-agent dispatch table includes the new haiku-tier interaction classifier agent with its model, dispatched-by context
  <- Satisfies: epic approach describing the classifier agent
- When this story is complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents the brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles config key with its default value and purpose
  <- Satisfies: epic SC4 "brainstorm.max_interaction_cycles"
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md Architecture section describes the cross-epic interaction scan mechanism and the interaction:deferred tag lifecycle
  <- Satisfies: epic context about cross-epic visibility

## Escalation Policy
Escalation policy: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue that could send implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. All assumptions made without escalating are documented.
